data.body: Bug 5e40 assessed VALID (verified from store: f1fa PASS->BLOCK at identical fingerprint 0290197d after HEAD drift; 11:44 verbatim re-block norm ne7642adbf79 with intra-verdict contradiction — G3 advisory quotes the provision the E2/F1 block claims absent; validity 0.94 + hard-override 0.85). Rejected two report remediations as-written: blanket no-new-blocks-on-drift contract (overbroad — drift CAN invalidate) and authoritative comment-trail consultation (self-refutation gaming channel). Checked origin history: progressive_drift_refresh fully implemented (3c2d2c920, 22572a72b, bd7d0d411) but default OFF — enablement NOT done. Created approved Story A a37b-f1d3-ae2d-44b1 under epic 9d50 (enable drift-refresh by default, 70c8-pattern flip + measurement + behavioral test), discovered_from 5e40. Story B design (Pass-2 grounding hardening) answered in-session, awaiting approval.
